<includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}}
|rhino= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+250</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">2</span>
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|butcher= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+200</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span>Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|monk= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+700</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+350</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|croc= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+350</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|colossus= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+300</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|mantis= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+250</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|mother= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+250</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|gargoyle= {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|stats=<span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> HP<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+750</span> +HP per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">+350</span> Speed<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1</span> Damage<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">1.5</span> +Damage per wave<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped<br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">Starting waves</span> Elite Waves (round 11-18)<br>
	|minimumdanger=[[Dangers]] 2
	|reward=<span style="color:rgb(255,0,0);">Legendary [[Items|Item]]</span><br><span style="color:rgb(0,255,0);">10</span> Coins Dropped
	|#default=-
}}
|#default=Elite name not found}}</includeonly><noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Elite Data
|any Elite name
|select one of these to output corresponding information (stats/minimumdanger/reward)
}}
</pre>

Example:
<pre>
{{Elite Data|Rhino|stats}}
</pre>
{{Character Data|Rhino|stats}}


Example:
<pre>
{{Elite Data
|Rhino
|stats
}}
</pre>
{{Elite Data
|Rhino
|stats
}}
</noinclude>
